## Source: ghsa-malware (08291aa58e3238bc4c87bb15f3c6483301821668344e2cafa88ed2935ba3d446)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (8c545bd0ca0111537f9336af6eeeef4e580a90a7468ff22cf9b1b20dd3fcf51d)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'console_auth' @ 99.99.99 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
